title: Independent Anti-Slavery Commissioner: strategic plan 2024 to 2026
body: "The strategic plan for 2024 to 2026 from the UK’s Independent Anti-Slavery commissioner, presented to Parliament pursuant to Section 42 (10) (a) of the Modern Slavery Act 2015.   We are aware some of these publications may have accessibility issues. We are reviewing them so that we can fix these.  Read more about our accessible documents policy.  "
